title: Add SearchResult.Kind Field to Disambiguate Page vs Memory Results
description:
Research Report R1-011 (Confidence 94%, Critical). SearchResult.PageId is overloaded — unified search returns both kind=memory (UUID) and kind=page (slug). Calling GetPageAsync on memory UUIDs will fail silently or produce wrong results.

Fix: Add a Kind field to SearchResult (values: "page" or "memory"). Update all consumers to check Kind before calling GetPageAsync. Add tests verifying GetPageAsync is only called when Kind=="page".

Source: research-MemorySmith.Agent Sprint-35 Code Audit, Council Addendum 2026-06-26
